description: Composition Black shirt made of 100% combed cotton, has a spread collar, long sleeves with mid arm button tabs, full front buttoned placket, patch pocket on the left chest, stitch detailing, branding embroidered on the pocket and a curved hem Fit Slim Wash care Hand or machine wash in cold water with like colours using a mild detergent Do not bleach Tumble dry low Dry in shade Warm iron; do not iron on decorations This classic black shirt from scullers adds a big dose of style to your casual look. Be the cynosure of all eyes in this shirt, while the soft cotton fabric keeps you fresh and comfortable all day. Pair it with denims or corduroys and casual footwear. Model statistics The product is a size 40 on a model of height 6' and shoulders 18”
